zh.lifeSummary: 當André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré於大約1155年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，他的父親Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré36歲，母親Emma de Dinan20歲。他於1180年3月26日與Mathilde de Mayenne在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年6月9日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré于大约1155年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，他的父亲Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré36岁，母亲Emma de Dinan20岁。他于1180年3月26日与Mathilde de Mayenne在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年6月9日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: André
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Andrew  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré was born about 1155, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, was 36 and his mother, Emma de Dinan, was 20. He married Mathilde de Mayenne on 26 March 1180, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 June 1211, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré est né environ 1155, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma de Dinan, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Mayenne le 26 mars 1180, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1211, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré um 1155 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré 36 und seine Mutter Emma de Dinan 20. Er hat am 26. März 1180 in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich Mathilde de Mayenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1211 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré è nato il circa 1155 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Dinan, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Mayenne il 26 marzo 1180, nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 giugno 1211, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitréが約1155年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitréは36歳，母Emma de Dinanは20歳であった。1180年3月26日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインでMathilde de Mayenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年6月9日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré(이)가 대략 1155년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Dinan(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1180년 3월 26일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 Mathilde de Mayenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 6월 9일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Dinan, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Mayenne em 26 de março de 1180, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1211, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré родился около 1155 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Dinan, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Mayenne 26 марта 1180 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 июня 1211 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré nació aproximadamente 1155, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma de Dinan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Mayenne el 26 de marzo de 1180, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1211, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
